active_ingredients: Active Ingredient (in each extended-release bi-layer tablet) Guaifenesin 1200 mg
indications_and_usage: Uses ■ helps loosen phlegm (mucus) and thin bronchial secretions to rid the bronchial passageways of bothersome mucus and make coughs more productive
dosage_and_administration: Directions ■ do not crush, chew, or break tablet ■ take with a full glass of water ■ this product can be administered without regard for timing of meals ■ adults and children 12 years of age and over: 1 tablet every 12 hours. Do not exceed 2 tablets in 24 hours. ■ children under 12 years of age: do not use
